description: Foundations Patch 2 (15 May 2024) — Albion Europe fully opened, Marketplace price sort, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Bows, Shapeshifter Staffs, War Gloves, Offhands, Potions), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
items: The mist has receded from Albion Europe — the entire world is now accessible (note: newly opened territories cannot be claimed until invasion timers are active on May 25)
Added price sort dropdown menu to Marketplace UI
sections.searchable_text: Changes Albion Europe mist receded world accessible territories invasion timers May 25 Marketplace price sort dropdown

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Arcane Protection Forced Movement Enigma Blade Cooldown Bows Magic Arrow Warbow Damage vs players mobs Shapeshifter Staffs Pulse Shock Pounce Prowling Staff Wild Onslaught Primal Staff Barbed Roots Rootbound Staff War Gloves Infernal Boulder Hellfire Hands Offhands Shield Sarcophagus Caitiff Shield Facebreaker Potions Cleansing Tornado Hellfire Acid Calming

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Arcane Protection shield Forced Movement Enigma Blade Cooldown 20 18

changes.raw_text: Arcane Protection: The shield is no longer removed after blocking a Forced Movement effect
notes: The shield is no longer removed after blocking a Forced Movement effect

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Magic Arrow Warbow within 6m Damage vs players 156.11 172 vs mobs 184 202 outside 6m players 211.21 232 mobs 257 283

changes.raw_text: Magic Arrow: Within 6m: Damage vs players 156.11 → 172; vs mobs 184 → 202. Outside 6m: Damage vs Players 211.21 → 232; vs Mobs 257 → 283.

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Pulse Shock Damage 135 124 Pounce Prowling Staff Range 11m 9m Wild Onslaught Primal Staff Resistance Reduction 0.18 0.15 Duration 5s 3s Barbed Roots Rootbound Staff cleanse removed Damage per Tick 55 44

changes.raw_text: Wild Onslaught: Resistance Reduction: 0.18 → 0.15; Resistance Reduction Duration: 5s → 3s
Barbed Roots: Removed the initial cleanse when cast. Damage per Tick: 55 → 44.
notes: Removed the initial cleanse when cast

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Infernal Boulder Hellfire Hands 1st 210 199.5 2nd 140 133 3rd 70 66.5

subsections.heading: Offhands
subsections.searchable_text: Offhands Shield Bonus Defense 1700 IP 12% 13.5% Sarcophagus 15% 16.875% Caitiff Shield CC Duration 10% 20% Facebreaker 8% 9%

changes.raw_text: Caitiff Shield: Bonus CC Duration at 1700 IP: 10% → 20%

subsections.heading: Potions
subsections.searchable_text: Potions Cleansing Potion Cooldown 120s 90s Hellfire Potion Damage 10% Tornado in a Bottle 120s 90s dissolves tornados Acid Potion resistance reduction 12.5% Calming Potion Shield 15%

changes.raw_text: Hellfire Potion: Damage increased by 10% across all tiers
notes: Damage increased by 10% across all tiers

changes.raw_text: Tornado in a Bottle: Cooldown: 120s → 90s; No longer dissolves other tornados
Acid Potion: Resistance reduction increased by 12.5% across all tiers
notes: Resistance reduction increased by 12.5% across all tiers

changes.raw_text: Calming Potion: Shield increased by 15% across all tiers
notes: Shield increased by 15% across all tiers

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where Farming UI displayed incorrect grow rate bonus
Fixed issue where, in Arena, Item Details UI would not display as intended
Fixed issue where swapping items in inventory would not work correctly
Fixed issue where castle gates would not display on minimap or region map
Fixed issue where Barbed Roots (Rootbound Staff) shield would only block the first forced movement effect while active
Fixed issue where, in certain territories, attacking players could open Fortification Gates from the outside
Fixed issue where players could become stuck while fishing
[Mobile] Fixed issue where Raid Banner tooltips and timers did not update correctly after interaction
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Farming UI grow rate Arena Item Details inventory swapping castle gates minimap region map Barbed Roots Rootbound Staff shield forced movement Fortification Gates fishing Mobile Raid Banner tooltips timers
